body:
### Summary
* Appended finalized **INTAKE 012** for idea-engine PROPOSAL 012, linking it to the routine-cadence economics sim and VERDICT 014 outcome. [control/inbox.mdL161-L168](https://github.com/menno420/sim-lab/blob/a92f7dcf63aa5332f0043a27c30bb58e3d4a1963/control/inbox.md#L161-L168)
* Appended finalized **VERDICT 014** to `control/outbox.md`, preserving the approve/no-posture-change recommendation and recording the Codex follow-up disposition. [control/outbox.mdL155-L164](https://github.com/menno420/sim-lab/blob/a92f7dcf63aa5332f0043a27c30bb58e3d4a1963/control/outbox.md#L155-L164)
* Refreshed `control/status.md` to show the queue consumed through PROPOSAL 012 / VERDICT 014, 14 finalized verdicts, and the current strict-check warning. [control/status.mdL3-L7](https://github.com/menno420/sim-lab/blob/a92f7dcf63aa5332f0043a27c30bb58e3d4a1963/control/status.md#L3-L7)
* Committed the changes on the current branch: `188e97c verdict-014: finalize coordinator ledgers`.
* Created the PR via `make_pr` with title: `verdict-014: finalize coordinator ledgers`.

**Testing**
* ✅ `python3 sims/verdict-014-routine-cadence-economics/cadence_economics_sim.py`
* ⚠️ `python3 bootstrap.py check --strict` (warning due to pre-existing historical session-card marker issue: `.sessions/2026-07-10-boot.md` still says in-progress)
* ✅ `git diff --check`

 [View task →](https://chatgpt.com/s/cd_6a53ae409c648191adf703bb6a8a539d)
